article.title: The TikTok Ban Was Never About TikTok
article.summary: A new documentary chronicles how the app became a stand-in for American anxieties about social media, China, and political power.
article.title_zh: TikTok 禁令從未是關於 TikTok
article.summary_zh: 一部新紀錄片記錄了該應用如何成為美國對社群媒體、中國和政治權力焦慮的代名詞。

article.title: Broadcom Is Eschewing Acquisitions in Favor of AI Organic Growth
article.summary: Broadcom Inc. Chief Executive Officer Hock Tan, who created the chip behemoth using a series of acquisitions, said the company is now less focused on dealmaking because AI offers stronger growth potential.
article.title_zh: Broadcom 放棄收購轉向 AI 有機增長
article.summary_zh: 通過一系列收購創造芯片巨頭的 Broadcom 首席執行官霍克·譚表示，該公司現在較少專注於交易，因為 AI 提供了更強的增長潛力。

article.title: Cable lobby warns of chaos if FCC doesn't relax ban on foreign routers
article.summary: The cable industry's primary lobby group is seeking a waiver of the Federal Communications Commission ban on foreign routers, warning of potential chaos if cable Internet service providers can't change some of the components in routers they offer to home broadband users. In March, the FCC added all consumer-grade routers made at least partly outside the US to its Covered List, which imposes restrictions on devices deemed to pose an unacceptable risk to national security. The change affected virtually all consumer routers, preventing new or changed models from being imported into or sold in the US. In a petition filed on Tuesday , NCTA-The Internet & Television Association asked the FCC to grant an expedited waiver allowing its members' suppliers to "substitute substrate materials and m
article.title_zh: 有線電視業遊說團警告 FCC 若不放寬外國路由器禁令將導致混亂
article.summary_zh: 美國有線電視業主要遊說團體尋求 FCC 外國路由器禁令的豁免，警告若有線寬頻供應商無法更換路由器中的某些零件將造成混亂。

article.title: Why agentic AI makes the ops platform the most important layer in the enterprise
article.summary: The biggest obstacle to enterprise AI isn’t models, data science talent, or even infrastructure.  It’s operations. Across today’s enterprises, hybrid complexity has outpaced IT’s ability to manage it. Applications, workloads, runtimes, and infrastructure now span on‑premises environments, public clouds, edge locations, and air‑gapped sites. Each layer brings its own tools, vendors, and operational language. The result is friction everywhere and a widening gap between AI ambition and operational reality. Latha Vishnubhotla , chief platform officer at Hewlett Packard Enterprise, tells The New Stack the challenges begin on Day 2. “People can bring things up and make them functional very quickly,” says. “But where they spend most of th
article.title_zh: 為什麼代理式 AI 使運維平台成為企業中最重要的層
article.summary_zh: 企業 AI 最大的障礙不是模型、資料科學人才或基礎設施，而是運維管理；如今混合環境的複雜性已超過 IT 部門的管理能力。

article.title: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety: Customizable Multimodal Safety for Global Enterprise AI
article.title_zh: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety：全球企業 AI 的可自訂多模態安全解決方案

article.title: Cable asks FCC for expedited waiver on broadband routers
article.summary: NCTA, an org that represents many US cable operators, wants the FCC to grant an expedited waiver for foreign-made consumer broadband routers that require limited memory and materials alterations.
article.title_zh: 有線電視運營商要求 FCC 加快批准寬頻路由器豁免
article.summary_zh: 代表許多美國有線電視運營商的組織 NCTA 要求 FCC 對需要有限記憶體和材料改動的外製消費者寬頻路由器授予加急豁免。

article.title: Google Gemma 4 12B nearly matches 26B benchmarks — and runs on your laptop
article.summary: Google has introduced Gemma 4 12B, a new model designed to bring high-performance, multi-modal intelligence to standard laptops. Small enough to run locally on a mere 16GB of VRAM or unified memory, the latest Gemma model is drawing enthusiasm in early community conversations where developers welcome the idea of making high performance local.  Almost as good as Gemma 4 26B, but much smaller Size matters. The standout quality of Google’s model released on Wednesday is that, according to the company, it performs nearly as well as Gemma 4 26B — but at less than half the total memory footprint. A look at the benchmarks does indeed show 12B neck and neck with 26B’s performance, even pushing past the older model on DocVQA (i.e., Document Visual Question Answering).&nb
article.title_zh: Google Gemma 4 12B 性能接近 26B 模型基準——且可在筆記型電腦上運行
article.summary_zh: Google 推出 Gemma 4 12B，一款設計用於為標準筆記型電腦帶來高性能、多模態 AI 的新模型，只需 16GB VRAM 或統一記憶體即可在本機運行。

article.title: Nvidia與微軟推RTX Spark，押注Windows PC成為本機AI代理平臺
article.summary: 在Computex 2026期間，Nvidia與微軟公布Windows個人AI代理運算平臺Nvidia RTX Spark，採用Nvidia Blackwell RTX GPU、20核心Nvidia Grace CPU與最高128GB統一記憶體架構（Unified Memory），鎖定創作者、AI開發者與玩家，主打特色是大型模型與AI代理可在使用者端裝置執行。
article.title_zh: Nvidia與微軟推RTX Spark，押注Windows PC成為本機AI代理平臺
article.summary_zh: Nvidia與微軟在Computex 2026公布Windows個人AI代理運算平臺Nvidia RTX Spark，搭載Blackwell RTX GPU與Grace CPU，主打大型模型與AI代理可在使用者端裝置執行。

article.title: Nvidia is reportedly still planning fabled RTX 50 Super series for 2026, leak claims — lineup could now include a potential 'RTX 5060 Super' with 12GB of VRAM
article.summary: For almost a year, the RTX 50 Super series has been part of the rumor mill, but with the AI boom snatching production lines, causing memory prices to skyrocket, hype for the lineup had died down. Now, a potential RTX 5060 Super with 12GB of VRAM is apparently in the works, with the 50 Super series as a whole allegedly getting "back on track."
article.title_zh: Nvidia 據稱仍計畫在 2026 年推出傳說中的 RTX 50 Super 系列，洩露聲稱——陣容現可能包括潛在的「RTX 5060 Super」配備 12GB VRAM
article.summary_zh: RTX 50 Super 系列已在謠言中流傳近一年，但由於 AI 熱潮佔用產能導致記憶體價格飆升，該系列的熱度已下降。現在據稱配備 12GB VRAM 的 RTX 5060 Super 正在開發中。

article.title: Industry coalition urges Trump administration to take urgent action as AI data centers' extreme memory consumption threatens other industries — AI-driven memory chip shortage could raise prices in automotive, medical, telecommunications sectors
article.summary: A coalition of nine U.S. trade associations has urged the Trump administration to address an AI-driven memory chip shortage, warning that soaring DRAM prices and constrained supply could raise costs for consumer electronics, automobiles, medical devices, and broadband infrastructure while disrupting supply chains through at least 2027.
article.title_zh: 業界聯盟敦促川普政府採取緊急行動，因 AI 資料中心的極端記憶體消耗威脅其他產業——AI 驅動的記憶體晶片短缺可能提高汽車、醫療、電信部門的價格
article.summary_zh: 一個由九個美國貿易協會組成的聯盟已敦促川普政府解決 AI 驅動的記憶體晶片短缺問題，警告 DRAM 價格飆升和供應受限可能提高消費電子、汽車、醫療設備和寬頻基礎設施成本。

article.title: Accelerating Zero-Knowledge Proof Generation With Reconfigurable Hardware (KAIST)
article.summary: Researchers from Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST) have published “ZK-Flex: A Flexible and Scalable Framework for Accelerating Zero-Knowledge Proofs”. Abstract “Zero-knowledge proofs (ZKP) allows a prover to convince a verifier of computational correctness without revealing private data, ensuring both privacy and verifiability. However, proof generation is highly compute-intensive, dominated by polynomial (POLY) and elliptic-curve (EC) operations. These workloads pose two key challenges for hardware acceleration: (1) efficiently supporting diverse large-precision modular multiplications, and (2) maintaining high utilization across workloads that dynamically shift between POLY and EC stages. Existing reconfigurable accelerators address these issues only partially, r
article.title_zh: 使用可重構硬體加速零知識證明生成（KAIST）
article.summary_zh: 來自韓國高等科學技術學院（KAIST）的研究人員發表了「ZK-Flex：一個用於加速零知識證明的靈活且可擴展的框架」。

article.title: The latest Gemma 4 models use a training trick to slash their on-device memory footprint
article.summary: TL;DR Gemma 4 models are now available for download with quantization-aware training (QAT), which reduces the size and memory footprint of the models. These open-source models retain quality better thanks to QAT compared to those that use post-training quantization (PTQ). The Gemma 4 models optimized with QAT are available in five sizes: Gemma 4 E2B, Gemma 4 E4B, Gemma 4 12B, Gemma 4 26B A4B, and Gemma 4 31B. Following Google’s launch of the laptop-grade Gemma 4 12B model earlier this week, the company is releasing new Gemma 4 model checkpoints with quantization-aware training. Quantization is necessary to reduce the amount of memory required to run lightweight models. The standard method is post-training quantization (PTQ), which quantizes the model after training, but could result in wea
article.title_zh: 最新 Gemma 4 模型使用訓練技巧大幅減少裝置記憶體佔用
article.summary_zh: Gemma 4 模型現已支援量化感知訓練 (QAT)，減少模型大小和記憶體佔用，同時保持更好的品質。

article.title: Anthropic warns Claude AI is building itself faster than expected, calls for option to halt frontier development —'recursive self improvement' increases risk humans lose control of AI
article.summary: Anthropic has published a report warning that the development path it’s on could eventually leave humans unable to control AI systems.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 警告 Claude AI 自我改進速度超預期，呼籲選擇暫停前沿開發——「遞迴自我改進」增加人類失控風險
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 發佈報告警告，其當前開發路徑最終可能導致人類無法控制 AI 系統。
